race.comment: CROWN OF RUSSIA (2) finished out of the money when fresh from a spell two starts back then was beaten 4.5 lengths when fifth over 1717m at Sale. Ideally placed here with those runs under the belt and 2200m looks suitable. HERE COMES RUBY (8) has been racing more consistently than most and gets in nicely after the 2kg claim, so no reason to think she won't be around the mark again. PRESLEY (3) gets here third-up and while a long way from the winner last start, that was in a 62 grade of race, which is a marked step up on this. Should be nearing peak fitness now. MAYEKI (9) produced a reasonable effort when fifth last start over 2124m at Echuca, beaten 1.75 lengths, which followed a win at Stony Creek the start prior. Nicely placed to return to winning form. XTRAREVZ (1) doesn't win often these days, but the win on his recent formcard is only two runs ago in 62 grade, so this looks within his reach.
